entities.name: SECONDARY METABOLITES
entities.description: Diverse and valuable natural products that serve as major defense elements of plants against stress

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress conditions caused by living organisms

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress conditions caused by non-living environmental factors

entities.name: NITRIC OXIDE
entities.description: A signaling molecule used as an elicitor to stimulate secondary metabolite accumulation and regulate plant growth and defense

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The process of growth in plants, influenced by NO

entities.name: DEFENSE RESPONSES
entities.description: Plant reactions to stress, mediated by NO and secondary metabolites

entities.name: BIOSYNTHETIC PATHWAYS
entities.description: The series of chemical reactions that produce metabolites

entities.name: EXOGENOUS TREATMENTS WITH NO DONORS
entities.description: The application of NO donors to plants to enhance secondary metabolite accumulation

entities.name: PHENOLICS
entities.description: A type of secondary metabolite enhanced by NO donors

entities.name: FLAVONOIDS
entities.description: A type of secondary metabolite enhanced by NO donors

entities.name: CAFFEIC ACID DERIVATIVES
entities.description: A type of secondary metabolite enhanced by NO donors

entities.name: STRESS RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of plants to withstand or recover from stress

entities.name: PLANTS
entities.description: The biological organisms being studied in the context of stress and NO signaling
